title: I.M.Meen makes his move while Link failed to escape from his crime
description:
Fad continues! ;)
Chronological sequence of this fad's responce branch: 
1. Morshu Insults CommanderGwonam for Liking Furry
2. My Civilized Response to Morshu's Immature Words
3. The King establishes his authority
4. Mario Lays Down the Law
5. CommanderGwonam Get's into One Little Fight + Meanwhile in Hyrule:
6. This video :)

List of current characters:
I.M.Meen - TorNisYTP
Gwonam - CommanderGwonam
Gwonam without carpet - LieutenantGwo
Morshu - BigBowsa402 
King - Nazeem38
Mario - BigBowsa402's alt ego
Link -  MexicanSunflower

Subtitles:(Maybe I will make actual subtitle file later :P)

I.M.Meen(to Mario): Why hello little shit bizket(I dunno how to spell this word), I do hope you're enjoying your tits you fatass cock sucker.

Mario(to I.M.Meen): Hey, who the fuck are you?

I.M.Meen(to Mario): My name is...

King(interrupt): I.M.Meen.

I.M.Meen: O_o?

I.M.Meen(to King): What the fuck? That was my line you old yiff queer.

King: OAH Hahahahaha.

King(to All): I am King of CD-I. I say what I want. I rule Hyrule. You all do what I say.

Gwonam without carpet(to King): No.

King(to Gwonam without carpet): OAH! What the hell?

Gwonam without carpet(to King): I live in Koridai.
 
Morshu(to King): Me too. Mmmmmmmmmm. So, fuck off!

King: OOAAH!

Mario(to King): Plumbers in Mushroom Kindom ain't afraid of no furry Kings.

King(Insanely): OOOOOOOOAAAAAAAAAAAAAH!!!!!

I.M.Meen: I.M.Meen is a DOS game you little CD-I prick!

King(to I.M.Meen): You want a piece of me DOS shit?

Gwonam: STOP!!!

King: What the fuck?

Link: Oh, shit!

*flashback*

Gwonam(to King): Your Majesty, Link must die!

Storyline:
After Mario taunted King and Link failed to get rid of Gwonam by Morshu's order, I.M.Meen decided to join the fun. He started saying shit about Mario, but then, King unexpectedly interrupted I.M.Meen, which forced him to move his target to King. Then King showed to all his true cockyness and that made him main target by all participants. King is outnumbered, but, he decided to respond on I.M.Meen's taunt and start fighting with him. But then...all changed, when Gwonam mysteriously appears to have a revenge on Link.
